languages.text: "В результате сканирования в операционных найдены две жизнеформы с более низкой важностью для корабля. Запрос: утилизация менее эффективного персонала для освобождения места значимым офицерам". {n}Краем глаза вы замечаете, что генетор уже стоит возле когитатора, предназначенного для управления механизмами медицинских коек.{/n}

"Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator that controls the mechanisms of the individual beds.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В результате сканирования в операционных найдены две жизнеформы с более низкой важностью для корабля. Запрос: утилизация менее эффективного персонала для освобождения места значимым офицерам". {n}Краем глаза вы замечаете, что генетор уже стоит возле когитатора, предназначенного для управления механизмами медицинских коек.{/n}

"Four lower-ranking workers identified in the operating chambers. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator designed to control the mechanisms of the individual medical bays.{/n}

"Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. languages.text: 「システム内に4人の下級職員を発見。要求：貴重な役員のために、下級職員を処分する。」{n}あなたは、ゲネトールがすでに個々の医療室の機械を制御するコギテーターの近くで立っていることに気づきます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Four lower-ranking workers found in the system. Request: dispose of the rabble to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator designed to control the mechanisms of the individual medical bays.{/n}

languages.text: "Tarama, ameliyat bölgesinde iki düşük öncelikli yaşam formunu ortaya çıkardı. Talep: Değerli subaylara yer açmak için etkisi düşük mürettebatı bertaraf edin." {n}Göz ucuyla baktığında, Genetör'ün çoktan bireysel yatakların mekanizmalarını kontrol eden kavramsayarın yanında durduğunu fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator that controls the mechanisms of the individual beds.{/n}

languages.text: “扫描结果显示，手术区内存在两名低优先级生命体。请求：清理低效船员以腾出空间容纳宝贵的军官。”{n}你的余光瞥见基因士已站在那台专门控制独立医疗床装置的沉思者旁。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator that controls the mechanisms of the individual beds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “扫描结果显示，手术区内存在两名低优先级生命体。请求：清理低效船员以腾出空间容纳宝贵的军官。”{n}你的余光瞥见基因士已站在那台专门控制独立医疗床装置的沉思者旁。{/n}

languages.text: "Der Scan hat zwei Lebensformen von geringerer Priorität im Operationsbereich identifiziert. Anfrage: Beseitigung der weniger effizienten Crewmitglieder, um Platz für wertvolle Offiziere zu schaffen." {n}Aus dem Augenwinkel bemerkst du, dass der Genetor bereits neben dem Cogitator steht, der die Mechanismen der einzelnen Betten steuert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. Request: dispose of less effective crew members to make space for valuable officers." {n}Out of the corner of your eye, you notice that the Genetor is already standing near the cogitator that controls the mechanisms of the individual beds.{/n}

languages.text: « L'analyse a révélé deux entités à faible priorité dans la zone d'opération. Requête : élimination des membres d'équipage secondaires pour libérer de l'espace à l'intention des officiers de valeur. » {n}Du coin de l'œil, vous remarquez que le genetor s'est déjà rapproché du cogitateur contrôlant les mécanismes des lits individuels.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Scanning has revealed two lower-priority life forms in the operating area. languages.text: «El escaneo muestra dos formas de vida de baja prioridad en la zona de cirugía. Solicitud: eliminar a los tripulantes menos eficaces a fin de hacer sitio para oficiales valiosos». {n}Por el rabillo del ojo ves que el genetor ya está situado junto al cogitador que controla los mecanismos de las diferentes camas.{/n}
